notes: Jobs come from public job postings on the web.
Candidates are anonymized composite profiles derived from public resume-example sources.
Salary ranges are normalized assumptions for evaluation because the project schema requires them and some source postings do not publish compensation.

portfolio_projects.title: API Observability Platform

job.job_description_text: Build production backend systems at scale with Python, FastAPI, SQL, and well-documented APIs. Improve reliability, scalability, and observability for data-intensive services, and work with cloud, containers, and asynchronous workflows.

Build and maintain critical user-interface components in React and TypeScript. Raise frontend craftsmanship, quality, testing, validation, and product collaboration while shipping polished interfaces in a fast-moving environment.

Build machine-learning product features, data pipelines, and validation tooling in Python. Adapt state-of-the-art model architectures, automate data collection, and support production ML workflows across TensorFlow, cloud infrastructure, and orchestration tools.
